response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo demonstrates extensive and diverse full-stack experience across multiple industries, with a strong focus on TypeScript, Node.js, and React—key requirements for this role. Her recent work with AI-agent infrastructure (MCP, Model Context Protocol) and her open-source contributions align well with the secondary tech stack and emerging trends in automation tooling. While her experience with Kotlin/Java is limited to select backend services, her polyglot background and deep engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD) compensate significantly.
strengths: Deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, matching the primary stack requirements
Proven experience in AI-agent development and automation tooling, adding unique value to the role
Strong engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD, code reviews) and polyglot programming skills across multiple languages
concerns: Limited direct experience with Kotlin/Java for backend services, though she has worked with them in select contexts
Most recent full-stack experience is at re:cinq (since April 2025), which may raise questions about long-term application of skills
Primary experience is in B2B and niche domains (e.g., direct mail automation, GIS platforms), which may not fully align with enterprise automation tooling for engineering organizations

key_factors.factor: Polyglot programming and engineering best practices
